title: Outcome Cost
description: Generates a harder consequence for an outright setback.
entries: and it leaves a mark you'll carry
and someone you needed is gone
and the way back is closed now
and they know exactly where you are
and the thing you feared most is now true
and you lose what you came here to keep
and the ground shifts against you for good
and a friend pays for your mistake
and the enemy is stronger for it
and there is no undoing this one
and you're alone when you can least afford it
and the secret is out beyond your reach
and the trap closes with you inside it
and everything you built here comes apart
and the debt that follows will not be small
and trust breaks in a way you can't mend
and the door you needed is barred forever
and the wound goes deeper than the body
and the one chance you had is spent
and now they come for you in force
and what you dropped can't be picked back up
and the truth you hid is dragged into the open
and someone decides you can't be forgiven
and the cost lands on those who trusted you
